transcript.text:
*Pour
*Standing up because it's hot
Something is crying
What is that sound?
It's a water deer
Hello everyone
The mukbang I prepared for you guys today is
Cauldron pan dumplings!
I'm going to fry them
I received these from Pulmuone (brand)
There are 2 flavors here
They are both thin-layered dumplings and I'm going to fry them
"How many packets today?"?
I have a stack here but I don't think I can eat them all
How many dumplings are there in 1 bag?
420g per bag

4 bags will be almost 2kg (1.7kg)
Anyways, I will be eating these 2 flavors
The red one has a little kick to it So I will be eating more of the less spicy one
This one includes onion, chives, and meat
I'll cut it with scissors
It's very thin
I wonder how many I can fit in here
I think I can fit a lot in here
How do I fill it up?
1 has 11 of them
Yeah 11
Red bag now
*Chooses to dump it all in now
Hot hot hot
Don't splash!
Just like this

Hot
I will add more cooking oil
*Viewer: "Isn't the fire too low?"
I made it low on purpose so I don't end up burning everything
What is that?
Something is crying
It sounds like water deer
I think there's a water deer there
Shut it!
*Viewer: "You need to pour the oil over the dumplings with a ladle so it doesn't burn and it'll be delicious"
Ladle? I'm not sure if I have one
That's too big...
This cat has been meowing
It's crying a lot
Looks delicious
This really looks yummy

I want to try it already
Smells delicious~
It's hot! I need to cook standing up
Hot hot!
Oh no it's getting burnt
Emergency!
They still look delicious They're not too burnt yet
HOT!
Am I out of my mind? haha
Let me pour some water
You guys know the secret to a delicious fried dumpling, right?
I want to open and check
But we need to wait
*She opens it...
*Opens it again...
Looks yummy!

Bon Appetit!
They are really well cooked
Right?
Fried dumplings
Red one first?
No, the meat
Nevermind, I'll just eat the red one first They said it's a little spicy. We'll see about that
It's delicious!
It's really good
I don't taste the spiciness yet
The outside cover (flour)
Is really thin
So it fills like I'm eating a lot of the fillings
The wrap is very chewy
Super thin wrap
Really good

This is the regular meat one
Really well cooked
These don't have that thingie
The extra line of the flour on the top after it's folded
The inside is packed!
So good!
The meat is amazing
Move!
Hot! Just a second, it's too hot
It's yummy
The wrap is so thin that I almost can't feel it
It's so good!
They're nice and crispy
Look at the colors
The red one is not Kimchi dumpling It's spicy Pork and Seafood
They're red but they're not kimchi

It's so good, really
They are both tasty
But if I had to choose one,
I can't
But
I always thought I like thick wraps on my dumplings
But the thin layers taste so much better
Of course the fillings have to be delicious
The thin-wrapped dumplings go really well fried
If you fry the thick-wrapped ones,
they will just taste like flour
The extra line of flour will give a lot of bland taste
But I think these ones are perfect for pan frying
Kimchi or pickled radish? I have leek kimchi
Should I have some with this?
It's definitely...

Hot..
It just melts in my mouth It's very soft
I had these when I went on the show "My Little Television"
And I remember they were on the top of my list
It was very delicious
Kimchi with a small piece
Tasty
It's cooked to perfection
I usually get tired of eating dumplings (big amounts)
I usually won't feel good
But I'm okay right now
Crunchy
The background is nice, right?
"Up to how many dumplings can you eat?"
I think like 70 something
There are so many mosquitos The smoke here is the repeller

I have a whole repeller next to me
It smells
It's covering my whole body
I'm immune to mosquito bites now
It got even more crunchier and delicious with time
I love gyoza
Can I bring some ice? I want my beverage to be cold
It's too..
It's my wish
You will get some for me?
Thank you
I need to give my staff some dumplings
They've been waiting in front of me
They look desperate
The exploded ones!
Can I give you guys the burnt ones and the exploded ones?

*We had a nice meal together after filming this video
*Viewer: "Why did you go to Yokji Island?"
I came for healing, but it's tiring
Hot
Last piece
Final
It's nicely cooked
I had some dumplings today
The wrap was very thin
To the point I couldn't even feel it
It was very chewy
I liked it because I wasn't able to taste the flour
They were perfect for pan-frying
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
